Bus Timings

E306 Bus Schedule From Al Ghubaiba to Sharjah — Al Jubail Bus Station Route Overview

January 8, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus E306 is a popular intercity service that connects Dubai’s Ghubaiba Bus Station with Sharjah’s Al Jubail Bus Station. The service is well-suited for both daily commuters and occasional travelers, providing a comfortable and cost-effective alternative to driving.

Route Name E306
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 14 - Sharjah — Al Jubail Bus Station · 1
Total Distance Approximately 20-25 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-50 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 23:25 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 15-20
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus E306

Bus E306 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus E306 operates frequently throughout the day, making it convenient for passengers to plan their trips. Below are the bus timings:

From Ghubaiba Bus Station · 14 From Sharjah — Al Jubail Bus Station · 1
06:40 05:30
07:55 06:30
08:25 07:00
08:55 07:25
09:25 07:50
09:50 08:10
10:20 08:30
10:45 08:50
11:15 09:15
11:45 09:40
12:15 10:10
12:45 10:40
13:15 11:05
13:45 11:35
14:15 12:00
14:45 12:30
15:15 13:00
15:45 13:30
16:00 14:00
16:20 14:30
16:40 15:00
17:00 15:35
17:20 16:05
17:50 16:35
18:15 17:05
18:35 17:25
18:55 17:45
19:20 18:05
19:50 18:30
20:20 19:00
20:50 19:30
21:20 20:10
21:50 20:40
22:30 21:15
23:35 22:15
23:10  

Bus E306 Timetable

For the full E306 bus schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or access it through this link E306 Bus Timings. To view the timetable from Al Ghubaiba to Sharjah — Al Jubail Bus Station, please see the schedule below:

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for the E306 bus route is very reasonable, making it an attractive option for those commuting between Dubai and Sharjah. The ticket price is typically around AED 15-20, depending on the distance traveled. Passengers can pay using their Nol cards, which can be topped up online or at various ticket machines across Dubai.

Other RTA Dubai bus routes worth considering include the F62, which runs between Nadd Al Hamar and Umm Ramool before returning to Nadd Al Hamar, and the E411, connecting Ajman Al Musallah with Etisalat Station.

Bus Booking

Passengers can plan their journey on the E306 bus using the RTA Dubai app, which offers route details, schedules, and real-time tracking. Nol cards for fare payment can be recharged online via the RTA website or app, adding convenience. Tourists can also opt for day or multi-day passes for unlimited travel during their stay, ensuring flexibility. This digital approach simplifies commuting and enhances the overall travel experience.

Bus Route

The route is designed to cover important landmarks and areas, ensuring accessibility to various neighborhoods and commercial centers. The key stops include:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 14

  2. Khaleej Road

  3. Kuwait Hospital

  4. Mahlab School

  5. Mamzar · 9

  6. Al Qasba

  7. Al Wahda East (Subway)

  8. Al Wahda Center, 2

  9. City Center

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Abu Shagara (Jumbo-Sony)

  2. Al Nad Medcare Hospital (ADNOC Petrol Station)

  3. Old Gold Souq

  4. Sharjah — Al Jubail Bus Station · 1

Bus E306 Stations Overview

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 14

Located in the historic district of Bur Dubai, it offers passengers easy access to the surrounding cultural and commercial attractions.

The station is well-equipped with modern amenities such as waiting areas, ticket counters, and real-time information displays, ensuring a comfortable and efficient travel experience.

Al Wahda Rd, Subway 1-2 Sharjah Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Wahda Rd, Subway 1-2 Sharjah Bus Stop is a key transit hub where Bus Routes E306, E307A, E307, E303, and E304 intersect. This central location provides seamless connections across Sharjah and beyond, making it easier for passengers to access various destinations. Its strategic position ensures convenient travel options for daily commuters and travelers in the region.

Sharjah — Al Jubail Bus Station · 1

As the terminus for Bus E306, it plays a vital role in linking Sharjah to Dubai’s Ghubaiba Bus Station.

Its strategic location near Sharjah’s central market and other key landmarks makes it a convenient choice for both daily commuters and occasional travelers.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Several tourist attractions and destinations are located along the Bus E306 route: 1.

  1. Al Mamzar Beach Park: Located near the Mamzar stop, this beach park is a popular destination for relaxation, offering beautiful beaches, swimming pools, and picnic areas.

3.

  1. Sharjah City Center: A major shopping mall near the City Center stop, offering a variety of shops, restaurants, and entertainment options.

  2. Sharjah Gold Souq (Old Gold Souq): A traditional market near the Old Gold Souq stop, where you can explore a wide range of gold jewelry and traditional Arabic designs.

Journey Experience

Starting from Al Ghubaiba, passengers pass traditional souks and Dubai Creek, a key historical waterway.

A unique highlight is the scenic Sharjah Corniche, showcasing the city’s waterfront charm. Though the journey is lengthy, it provides a captivating blend of historical landmarks and cultural attractions, making the trip both scenic and enriching.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can easily reach Sharjah — Al Jubail Bus Station, which is the final stop on the E306 bus route, starting from Ghubaiba Bus Station. The ride offers a convenient and direct option, with a price range of AED 81-93.

In summary, Bus E306 offers a reliable and economical option for those traveling between Dubai and Sharjah, with convenient stops and frequent timings. Whether you’re commuting for work or exploring the city, this bus service ensures a smooth and hassle-free journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 8, 2026.
